description.p: Lyra is a native music player for KDE Plasma. It scans your local music library, plays it gaplessly through PipeWire, and borrows its palette from the album art you are listening to.

ul.li: Local library browsing by song, album, artist and genre
Accent color and background sampled from the current cover art
Play, seek, shuffle and repeat with a shuffle-aware Up Next queue
10-band equalizer, plus bit-perfect and crossfade options
MPRIS integration for media keys and the Plasma media applet
Session restore — reopens on the track you left off

description.p: Bare N/P and media-key shortcuts, plus a one-line install script.
Keyboard shortcuts, automatic advance to the next track when one finishes, and UI fixes.
